mapper.sql: id, proj_id, init_proj_name, init_head_name, init_proj_status, changeitem, old_value, new_value, reason, intro, data_status, sub_user_id, sub_date, check_status, check_user_id, check_date, serial_no, creator, creator_name, create_time, operate_time, sys_no, note, old_value_desc, new_value_desc
mapper.select:
select spic.id as rowId, spic.proj_id as "projId.id", spin.name as "projId.name", spic.changeitem as "changeitem.id",cspci.name as "changeitem.name", spic.old_value as oldValue, spic.new_value as newValue,spic.reason as "reason.id",cspcr.name as "reason.name", spic.intro as intro, spic.data_status as dataStatus, suser.name as subUserName, spic.sub_date as subDate, spic.check_status as checkStatus, spic.serial_no as serialNo, spic.sys_no as sysNo, spic.note as note, spic.old_value_desc as oldValueDesc, spic.new_value_desc as newValueDesc from srm_projects_info_change spic left join srm_projects_info spin on spin.id=spic.proj_id left join ct_srm_project_change_item cspci on cspci.code=spic.changeitem left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=spic.creator left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=spic.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_project_change_reason cspcr on cspcr.code=spic.reason
where spic.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_projects_info_change
data_status = #{dataStatus},
check_status = #{auditStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select:
select spic.id as rowId, spic.proj_id as initProjId, spin.name as initProjName, cspci.name as changeitemName, spic.old_value as oldValue,spin.sub_no as subNo,luser.name as headName, spic.new_value as newValue,spic.changeitem as "changeitem.id",cspci.name as "changeitem.name", cspcr.name as reasonName, spic.intro as intro, spic.data_status as dataStatus, suser.name as subUserName, spic.sub_date as subDate, spic.check_status as checkStatus, spic.serial_no as serialNo, spic.sys_no as sysNo, spic.note as note, spic.old_value_desc as oldValueDesc, spic.new_value_desc as newValueDesc from srm_projects_info_change spic left join srm_projects_info spin on spin.id=spic.proj_id left join ct_srm_project_change_item cspci on cspci.code=spic.changeitem left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=spic.creator left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=spic.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_user luser on luser.id=spin.head left join ct_srm_project_change_reason cspcr on cspcr.code=spic.reason left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=spic.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=spic.id where eafrec.step_no>1 and spic.sys_no=#{projectsInfoChangeDto.sysNo} and spin.sys_no=#{projectsInfoChangeDto.prjSysNo} and ( (spic.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{projectsInfoChangeDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where spic.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=spic.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{projectsInfoChangeDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (spic.data_status=0 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{projectsInfoChangeDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and eafrec.check_result=#{projectsInfoChangeDto.auditState}
